name: Mapletree North Asia Commercial Trust
summary: Listed on the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited ("SGX-ST") on 7 March 2013, Mapletree North Asia Commercial Trust ("MNACT") is the first real estate investment trust (√Ç¬ìREIT√Ç¬î) that offers investors the opportunity to invest in best-in-class commercial properties situated in prime locations in China, in Hong Kong SAR, in Japan and in South Korea.
